summary: Ilyan, like always, has done excellent. He was counting one to ten with me. He was feeding a bunny. He was pretending with a chocolate. He was brushing Linda's teeth. He knew what colors to put away into the right boxes. He did well for actions. He was following. He was clapping his hands. He was stomping his feet.

He is able to count from one to ten. They can repeat colors, red, blue, yellow & green. Everyone says, yes, please. Thank you, Hello & Bye-Bye. They did well with feeding Bunny from his bottle. They followed the requests for action, stomping their feet, clapping their hands. They also did well with matching the bowling pins to the colored boxes and putting the night star magnets. They also enjoyed the magnets with the night sky. They are able to repeat body parts, while pointing to the body part. Has wonderful motivation & participation. Gets along well with their classmates & teacher. Waits to take their turn to participate. Behaves very well. He also tries to count on his fingers, while counting out loud. He also tries to sing along with the teacher.

he has excellent motivation & participation. he comes to class smiling & happy. he's eager to start the lesson & appears to enjoy speaking English. he has increased his English vocabulary greatly. Repeating vocabulary & phrases after the teacher & remembering the vocabulary. He sings with the teacher. He waits his turn. Gets along well with his teacher & classmates.
